examples.sentence: 彼は文句を言ってばかりだ。
examples.translation: He is always complaining.
examples.translationEn: He is always complaining
examples.romaji: Kare wa monku wo itte bakari da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He is always complaining

examples.sentence: この映画は面白くなくて、退屈してばかりだ。
examples.translation: This movie isn't interesting, and I'm just bored.
examples.translationEn: This movie isnt interesting, and Im just bored
examples.romaji: Kono eiga wa omoshirokunakute, taikutsu shite bakari da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This movie isnt interesting, and Im just bored

examples.sentence: 彼女は暇でいるばかりだ。
examples.translation: She is always just idling around with nothing to do.
examples.translationEn: She is always just idling around with nothing to do
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa hima de iru bakari da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She is always just idling around with nothing to do

examples.sentence: 最近、仕事の失敗ばかりだ。
examples.translation: Lately, it’s just been one failure at work after another.
examples.translationEn: Lately, it’s just been one failure at work after another
examples.romaji: Saikin, shigoto no shippai bakari da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Lately, it’s just been one failure at work after another

examples.sentence: 雨が降ったばかりに、試合が中止になりました。
examples.translation: Simply because it rained, the match was cancelled.
examples.translationEn: Simply because it rained, the match was cancelled
examples.romaji: Ame ga futta bakari ni, shiai ga chuushi ni narimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Simply because it rained, the match was cancelled

examples.sentence: 彼が遅れたばかりに、私たちも遅刻しました。
examples.translation: Because he was late, we ended up being late too.
examples.translationEn: Because he was late, we ended up being late too
examples.romaji: Kare ga okureta bakari ni, watashitachi mo chikoku shimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Because he was late, we ended up being late too

examples.sentence: 忘れ物をしたばかりに、買い物に戻らなければなりません。
examples.translation: Simply because I forgot something, I have to go back to the store.
examples.translationEn: Simply because I forgot something, I have to go back to the store
examples.romaji: Wasuremono wo shita bakari ni, kaimono ni modoranakereba narimasen.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Simply because I forgot something, I have to go back to the store

examples.sentence: 彼女が美人なばかりに、みんなが彼女を羨んでいます。
examples.translation: Just because she is beautiful, everyone is envious of her.
examples.translationEn: Just because she is beautiful, everyone is envious of her
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga bijin na bakari ni, minna ga kanojo wo urayande imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Just because she is beautiful, everyone is envious of her

examples.sentence: 高いものがいいものばかりではない。
examples.translation: Expensive things are not always good.
examples.translationEn: Expensive things are not always good
examples.romaji: Takai mono ga ii mono bakari de wa nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Expensive things are not always good

examples.sentence: 英語ができれば、成功するというものでもない。
examples.translation: Just because you can speak English doesn’t mean you’ll succeed.
examples.translationEn: Just because you can speak English doesn’t mean you’ll succeed
examples.romaji: Eigo ga dekireba, seikou suru to iu mono demo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Just because you can speak English doesn’t mean you’ll succeed

examples.sentence: 見た目が美しいからといって、心も美しいというものでもない。
examples.translation: Just because someone is beautiful on the outside, it doesn’t mean they’re beautiful on the inside.
examples.translationEn: Just because someone is beautiful on the outside, it doesn’t mean they’re beautiful on the inside
examples.romaji: Mitame ga utsukushii kara to itte, kokoro mo utsukushii to iu mono demo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Just because someone is beautiful on the outside, it doesn’t mean they’re beautiful on the inside

examples.sentence: 有名大学に入れば、将来が安泰だというものでもない。
examples.translation: Getting into a famous university doesn’t guarantee a secure future.
examples.translationEn: Getting into a famous university doesn’t guarantee a secure future
examples.romaji: Yuumei daigaku ni haireba, shourai ga antai da to iu mono demo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Getting into a famous university doesn’t guarantee a secure future

examples.sentence: デザインはともかく、機能はこの携帯電話が一番です。
examples.translation: As for design, the functionality of this phone is the best.
examples.translationEn: As for design, the functionality of this phone is the best

examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As for design, the functionality of this phone is the best

examples.sentence: 彼の容姿はともかく、性格は素晴らしいです。
examples.translation: Putting aside his looks, his personality is wonderful.
examples.translationEn: Putting aside his looks, his personality is wonderful
examples.romaji: Kare no youshi wa tomokaku, seikaku wa subarashii desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Putting aside his looks, his personality is wonderful

examples.sentence: 料理の味はともかく、盛り付けは綺麗です。
examples.translation: Putting aside the taste of the food, the presentation is beautiful.
examples.translationEn: Putting aside the taste of the food, the presentation is beautiful

examples.sentence: 値段はともかく、このバッグの質は良いです。
examples.translation: Ignoring the price, this bag’s quality is good.
examples.translationEn: Ignoring the price, this bag’s quality is good
examples.romaji: Nedan wa tomokaku, kono baggu no shitsu wa yoi desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Ignoring the price, this bag’s quality is good

examples.sentence: 失敗するのはまだしも、やらないで後悔する方がつらい。
examples.translation: Failing is one thing, but regretting not even trying is worse.
examples.translationEn: Failing is one thing, but regretting not even trying is worse
examples.romaji: Shippai suru no wa mada shimo, yaranai de koukai suru hou ga tsurai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Failing is one thing, but regretting not even trying is worse

examples.sentence: このピザは野菜が少ないのはまだしも、味も悪い。
examples.translation: It’s not just that this pizza has few vegetables, it also tastes bad.
examples.translationEn: It’s not just that this pizza has few vegetables, it also tastes bad

examples.sentence: たまに遅刻するのはまだしも、連絡もせずに遅刻するのは許せない。
examples.translation: Being late occasionally might be forgivable, but being late without any contact is unacceptable.
examples.translationEn: Being late occasionally might be forgivable, but being late without any contact is unacceptable
examples.romaji: Tama ni chikoku suru no wa mada shimo, renraku mo sezu ni chikoku suru no wa yurusenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Being late occasionally might be forgivable, but being late without any contact is unacceptable

examples.sentence: 難しい質問に答えられないのはまだしも、簡単な質問にも答えられないのは問題だ。
examples.translation: It’s one thing not to be able to answer difficult questions, but it’s a real problem if you can’t even answer simple ones.
examples.translationEn: It’s one thing not to be able to answer difficult questions, but it’s a real problem if you can’t even answer simple ones
examples.romaji: Muzukashii shitsumon ni kotaerarenai no wa mada shimo, kantan na shitsumon ni mo kotaerarenai no wa mondai da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It’s one thing not to be able to answer difficult questions, but it’s a real problem if you can’t even answer simple ones
